sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْحَدِيقَةُ الْعَامَّةُ مَكَانًا لِلرَّاحَةِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Javni park bio je mjesto za odmor u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The public garden was a place for rest in the city.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ فِيهَا أَشْجَارٌ كَثِيرَةٌ وَنَافُورَةُ مَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: U njemu je bilo mnogo drveća i vodoskok.
sentences.translationEn: It had many trees and a water fountain.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الْكِبَارُ وَلَعِبَ الأَطْفَالُ فِي الظِّلِّ.
sentences.translation: Odrasli su sjedili a djeca se igrala u hladu.
sentences.translationEn: The adults sat and the children played in the shade.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْحَدِيقَةُ مَفْتُوحَةً لِلْجَمِيعِ بِلَا اسْتِثْنَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Park je bio otvoren za sve bez izuzetka.
sentences.translationEn: The garden was open to everyone without exception.
